Precondition: 1. Org has location-tagged tracking data from the previous quarter 2. benchmark recalculation has been triggered 3. Remote vs Office dashboard is accessible
Name: Remote vs Office benchmark bars show real data across all four widgets
expected_result: *All four widgets display benchmark bars with real non-zero values *Each widget shows two bars labeled "Remote average" and "Office average"
parsed_steps: ["Open the Remote vs Office dashboard for the org", "Check Activity Highlights widget benchmark bars", "Check Productivity Highlights widget benchmark bars", "Check Utilization widget benchmark bars", "Check Focus Time widget benchmark bars"]

Precondition: *Org has location-tagged tracking data from the previous quarter *Benchmark recalculation has been triggered *Remote vs Office dashboard is accessible
Name: Benchmark bar labels show "Remote average" and "Office average" — not org/industry/occupation name
expected_result: *All four widgets display labels reading "Remote average" and "Office average" *No org name, industry name, or occupation name appears on any benchmark bar
